description: This 3D model displays a pile of crumpled bedding, likely a blanket or duvet, resting on top of another piece of bedding. The top layer is a light beige or tan color with visible folds and creases, suggesting it's made of a soft fabric like cotton or fleece. It appears to be casually tossed rather than neatly arranged. Beneath this is a green fabric, possibly a sheet or a patterned blanket, decorated with dark green and pink heart shapes. The overall impression is of a cozy, lived-in item, perhaps recently used or waiting to be put away.
